qids.subject: Operating System
qids.prose: A paging scheme uses a Translation Look-aside Buffer (TLB). A TLB-access takes ns and the main memory access takes ns. What is the effective access time(in ns) if the TLB hit ratio is and there is no page-fault? A. B. C. D.
